name: How much is my work-related lung disease case worth in Boise?
description: Medical + wage loss + permanency; varies by impairment.[2]

mainEntity.name: How much is my work-related lung disease case worth in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + wage loss + permanency; varies by impairment.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Depends on medical costs, lost wages, permanent impairment rating; temporary disability up to 68% wages, permanency via schedule.[2] No caps on medicals.[2] Key factors: Disability degree, future care, age. Attorney calculates via comp guidelines; free consult estimates value.
